parents.subject: LU-12668 ec: Add lfs mirror verify support for ec components

commit.subject: LU-12668 ec: add a test that mirror read does not change eof
commit.message:
LU-12668 ec: add a test that mirror read does not change eof

Test that reading from an EC mirror does not affect EOF
even if the parity stripes extend beyond the eof for data.

This currently fails.

Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I0ba4b2d7c2b144b61ffc35372764bde181dc75cd
